title: This Is #COMPASS2.0
overview: Welcome to #COMPASS2.0, where heroes from different worlds gather to enjoy time with their human partners.

title: Will You Be My Partner?
overview: Jin and the mysterious 13 are supposed to be partners now, so why does 13 seems to elude him at every turn?

title: A Comrade in Trouble
overview: Jin and 13 have to put their differences aside when another friend needs their help.

title: Chasing the Mastermind
overview: Jin, 13, Aojiru, and Jeanne venture to another world to track down the culprit behind the virus.

title: Defeat the Irregular
overview: While Jin and 13 investigate the virus, Reiya stumbles upon the presence of “irregulars” in #COMPASS.

title: Something Is Chasing After Us
overview: Several heroes are now hot on the trail of the irregular phenomenon, but something may be after them as well.

title: Please Remember
overview: One hero is determined to take the irregulars' power for himself, leading to a dangerous confrontation.

title: Aim for the Tower
overview: When disaster strikes across #COMPASS, Jin and 13 rush to the center of it all.

title: I Want to See You Again
overview: When Jin is forced to log out of the game, he'll have to find a creative way back in.

title: We Will Begin Anew
overview: Jin must confront his past before he can move forward.

title: Here I Am
overview: Jin is back in the game, but now he must stop a massive update from changing everything.

title: So, the Connecting World
overview: Can the heroes and their partners reconnect in time to save the world?
